thought.text: 我将查看 Mem2Reg 末尾接口并设计新增 Pass。

action.command: tail -180 /workspace/YatCC/task/4/Mem2Reg.cpp; printf '\n--- perf sources names ---\n'; for f in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/performance/*.sysu.c; do echo ===$(basename $f)===; sed -n '1,220p' $f | head -220; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "tail -180 /workspace/YatCC/task/4/Mem2Reg.cpp; printf '\\n--- perf sources names ---\\n'; for f in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/performance/*.sysu.c; do echo ===$(basename $f)===; sed -n '1,220p' $f | head -220; done", "timeout": 120, "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Inspect mem2reg run and performance source patterns"}
